title: I Hit $1M ARR in 117 Days. Bootstrapped to $10M. Here's My Playbook | Chatbase, Yasser Elsaid
summary: Yasser Elsaid, founder of Chatbase, shares insights on bootstrapping to $10M ARR without external funding, achieving $1M ARR in 117 days. The interview covers strategies on product-led growth, SEO, pricing, churn reduction, and decision-making frameworks for scaling.
